---
title: "Trisomy scRNA-seq analysis"
format: html
---

### Pipeline Stages

1. [Seurat v1](notebooks/seurat_trisomy_v1.qmd)
2. [Seurat v2](notebooks/seurat_trisomy_v2.qmd)
3. glmmTMB Volcano Plots
   - [Full genome](notebooks/glmmTMB_volcanos.qmd)
   - [chr21 removed](notebooks/glmmTMB_volcanos_chr21_removed.qmd)
4. glmmTMB DE (interaction plots, ISG, top genes)
   - [Full genome](notebooks/glmmTMB_DE.qmd)
   - [chr21 removed](notebooks/glmmTMB_DE_chr21_removed.qmd)
5. GSEA (glmmTMB, trisomy)
   - [Full genome](notebooks/gsea_glmmTMB_trisomy.qmd)
   - [chr21 removed](notebooks/gsea_glmmTMB_trisomy_chr21_removed.qmd)
6. [hdWGCNA (trisomy)](notebooks/hdwgcna_trisomy.qmd)
7. [hdWGCNA + glmmTMB stats (trisomy)](notebooks/hdwgcna_glmmTMB_stats_trisomy.qmd)
